data_scope: All customer transaction data including payment records and invoices
preservation_requirements: All backups containing customer transaction data from the specified period must be preserved until hold is released. Estimated duration: 5-7 years. This includes database backups, file storage backups, and any archived data containing transaction records.
notes: Meridian Corp v. Keystone Data. Discovery phase. Opposing counsel has requested production of all transaction records for the 3-year period. Estimated 4.2 million transaction records.

data_scope: Financial reporting data and audit trail logs
preservation_requirements: All backups containing financial reporting data and audit logs must be preserved. Includes general ledger exports, revenue recognition data, and internal audit trail. Regulatory requirement per SEC guidance.
notes: SEC inquiry regarding revenue recognition practices. Voluntary compliance with preservation obligation. Financial data includes customer contract values and billing records.

data_scope: Employee performance data and HR communications for 3 named employees
preservation_requirements: All backups containing HR system data, performance reviews, and internal communications for the named employees must be preserved. Includes Lattice performance data exports and email archives.
notes: Wrongful termination claim by former employee. Data preservation notice issued to IT and HR.
